creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

> Problems with pkg-plist. Won't package and leaves behind files.
> 
> http://www.freebsdnorth.com/tb/errors/10-FreeBSD/soapui-4.5.0.log

Ups, sorry.

Here's the patch with the corrected Makefile and pkg-plist.

----------------

diff -r -u devel/soapui/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/Makefile
--- devel/soapui/Makefile	2011-11-14 23:24:20.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/Makefile	2012-06-16 23:06:37.000000000 +0200
@@ -5,17 +5,16 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/devel/soapui/Makefile,v 1.12 2011/11/14 17:16:13 tabthorpe Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	soapui
-PORTVERSION=	3.5
+PORTVERSION=	4.5.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel java www
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}/
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}/4.5/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}-linux-bin
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	fbsd-ports@opsec.eu
 COMMENT=	A web service, SOA and SOAP testing tool
 
 USE_ZIP=	YES
 USE_JAVA=	1.5+
-PORTDOCS=	LICENSE.txt readme.txt
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 REINPLACE_ARGS=	-i ''
 SOAPUI_HOME=	${JAVASHAREDIR}/${PORTNAME}
diff -r -u devel/soapui/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/distinfo
--- devel/soapui/distinfo	2011-07-03 23:24:53.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/distinfo	2012-06-11 11:38:23.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (soapui-3.5-linux-bin.zip) = 66be38e2dc49f57f90e95cb41db1484fc0973b22246fe60ff649f3d741e60cd5
-SIZE (soapui-3.5-linux-bin.zip) = 50164133
+SHA256 (soapui-4.5.0-linux-bin.zip) = 4ff68dd9d60cb751314314640494115beaf6a802693bdca30d8cf931506fa937
+SIZE (soapui-4.5.0-linux-bin.zip) = 106472014
diff -r -u devel/soapui/files/patch-aa /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/files/patch-aa
--- devel/soapui/files/patch-aa	2010-04-06 20:06:18.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/files/patch-aa	2012-06-11 11:40:54.000000000 +0200
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
  
  export SOAPUI_CLASSPATH
  
--JAVA_OPTS="-Xms128m -Xmx384m -Dsoapui.properties=soapui.properties -Dsoapui.home=$SOAPUI_HOME"
+-JAVA_OPTS="-Xms128m -Xmx1024m -Dsoapui.properties=soapui.properties -Dsoapui.home=$SOAPUI_HOME"
 +JAVA_OPTS=" ${JAVA_OPTS} -Xms128m -Xmx384m -Dsoapui.properties=soapui.properties -Dsoapui.home=$SOAPUI_HOME"
  
  if [ $SOAPUI_HOME != "" ] 
diff -r -u devel/soapui/pkg-plist /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/pkg-plist
--- devel/soapui/pkg-plist	2010-04-13 15:21:28.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/devel/soapui/pkg-plist	2012-06-16 23:05:56.000000000 +0200
@@ -65,13 +65,10 @@
 %%PORTEXAMPLES%%%%EXAMPLESDIR%%/Tutorials/restexample/NewsSearchService/V1/search_files/yschx_nws_20050610a.css

-share/java/soapui/bin/libjniwrap.jnilib

-share/java/soapui/bin/soapui-3.5.jar

+share/java/soapui/bin/soapui-4.5.0.jar
